stimulus: The town of Macapá in Brazil ______blank one of only a handful of state capitals in the world located on the equator.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is correct. The singular verb “is” agrees with the singular subject “the town.”

Choices A, C, and D are all plural or plural-progressive forms that don’t agree with the singular subject.
